why: Persist the built index to disk for use by search and other consumers

output.console: Confirmation of index file write with path and size
output.file: knowledge.json index file written to configured output path

success_handling.criteria: Index is serialized to JSON and written to knowledge.json successfully, file is readable after write

error_handling.criteria: Filesystem returns EACCES or EPERM when attempting to write the index file
error_handling.action: Abort index write, report permission error

error_handling.criteria: Index object cannot be serialized to JSON (circular references, invalid values)
error_handling.action: Abort index write, report serialization error with details

event.message: Failed to serialize index to JSON: {error}

decisions.outcome: Abort index build flow, report error
